basic_details.job_title: ESIC Hospital Okhla Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 50 Senior Resident, Specialist Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) has published the Senior Resident, Specialist Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 50 Senior Resident, Specialist, and Super Specialist positions. Candidates within the age range of up to 45 years and holding qualifications such as PG Degree/Diploma in concerned specialty, MBBS with experience, or DM/MCh/DNB Super Speciality are eligible to attend the walk-in interview at esic.gov.in. The walk-in interview process will be conducted on 19 May 2026 and 20 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and official det

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD as per rules. OBC non-creamy layer certificate required.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in concerned specialty, MBBS with 2 years experience out of which 1 year in concerned specialty, MBBS + PG Degree/Diploma with 3/5 years experience, MBBS + MD/MS/DNB + DM/MCh/DNB Super Speciality
qualification.details: Senior Resident - Anesthesiology + ICU, Chest, Gynae, Microbiology, Ophthalmology, Orthopaedics, Pathology, Paediatrics + NICU, Radiology, Surgery, Cardiology, Medical Oncology, Nephrology, Gastroenterology, Endocrinology: Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in concerned specialty from recognized university, registered with Delhi Medical Council or Medical Council of India or State Medical Council. Contractual Senior Resident - Accident & Emergency: Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in concerned specialty or MBBS with 2 years experience (1 year in specialty). Full Time Contractual Specialist - Chest, Medicine, Pathology, Radiology: MBBS + PG Degree (3 years exp after) or PG Diploma (5 years exp after). Contractual Super Specialist - Cardiology, Medical Oncology, Nephrology, Gastroenterology, Neurology, Rheumatology: MBBS + MD/MS/DNB + DM/MCh/DNB in Super Speciality.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies released by ESIC Hospital Okhla?
faq.answer: ESIC Hospital Okhla has released a total of 50 vacancies for the post of Senior Resident and other contractual positions. These vacancies are spread across various specializations.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Senior Resident and Contractual Senior Resident posts is scheduled for 19th May 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue on time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Senior Resident and other contractual posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Senior Resident posts ranges from Rs. 67,700/- to Rs. 2,40,000/- per month, depending on the specific post and experience. Other contractual positions have different salary structures.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification generally requires a Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty. For some positions, MBBS with relevant experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the ESIC Hospital Okhla recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to report at the specified venue on the interview date with all required original documents and photocopies.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original and self-attested photocopies of their ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable). A duly filled application form may also be required.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for ESIC Hospital Okhla recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 500/- for General and OBC category candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a walk-in interview followed by document verification. Candidates are assessed based on their qualifications and performance during the interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the ESIC Hospital Okhla office. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for the exact address and reporting time.
